name: Pistol Squat
instructions: Stand on one leg with the other leg extended straight out in front of you. Hold your arms out in front of you for balance. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your back straight and your standing foot flat on the floor, slowly lower yourself by bending the knee and hip of your standing leg. Keep your extended leg off the ground throughout the movement.
Descend until your hamstring touches your calf or as low as your mobility allows. Keep your knee in line with your foot and avoid letting it cave inward.
Pause briefly at the bottom, then press through your heel to return to the starting position.
Complete all repetitions on one side before switching to the other leg.
